entries.title: UDL Quick Start: Multiple Means of Representation
entries.summary: A ~15-minute primer on the UDL principle of Multiple Means of Representation, with a knowledge check and a classroom-application reflection.

entries.title: Retrieval Practice: Quizzing that Builds Memory
entries.summary: A ~12-minute primer on retrieval practice (the 'testing effect') — why recalling beats re-reading — with a knowledge check and a classroom action plan.

entries.title: Giving Actionable Feedback to Students
entries.summary: A ~12-minute module on specific, actionable feedback — read the principles, then practice rewriting feedback in a scenario with formative AI coaching.

paths.title: Evidence-Based Teaching Essentials
paths.summary: A short curated sequence on practices with strong research support: retrieval practice, actionable feedback, and UDL representation.
